text: Welcome — this is the family list Colleen keeps for the Lanes.
Quick links
Open the Gift lists database
Holiday rotation: who hosts which holiday this year.
This year
Thanksgiving at Colleen's in Burlington
Confirm Christmas Eve plans with Brian
Christmas gift list: ideas for the grandchildren and family.
Ideas
Quilting fat quarters for Colleen
Order books for the grandchildren
Co-op grocery list: for the Wednesday Brattleboro Co-op run.
To buy
Bananas, buttermilk, and walnuts
Pick up King Arthur flour
Banana bread recipe: Phil's go-to loaf.
Ingredients
Three ripe bananas, mashed
Bake at 350 for an hour
Thanksgiving menu plan: what each family brings.
Menu
Phil brings the corn chowder and banana bread
Ask Brian to bring the pies
Birthday gift ideas: running list for the family.
Ideas
Heirloom seed packets for Pat's spring garden
Order a gift card for Kevin
Corn chowder recipe: the one the family asks for.
Ingredients
Sweet corn, Yukon potatoes, and cream
Simmer until potatoes are tender
Rolling grocery list: things to add as we run low.
Need soon
Coffee, eggs, and butter
Replace the water filter
